title: Network Reconnaissance & Service Enumeration
description: Designed and executed a controlled network reconnaissance workflow to identify open ports, running services, and exposed attack surfaces within a virtualized lab environment. Interpreted scan results to map service exposure and understand enumeration techniques from an attacker’s perspective.

title: Packet-Level Traffic Analysis
description: Captured and analyzed network traffic to inspect protocol behavior and data flow across services. Focused on packet-level inspection to understand communication patterns, identify anomalies, and build visibility into network interactions.

title: Role-Based Authentication System
description: Developed a web application implementing authentication and role-based access control. Designed user roles, enforced access boundaries, and handled session management to ensure proper privilege separation within the application.
